attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes; bootstraps this repo's project verify skill if none exists yet. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

The class listens to updates from input dispatcher\\n// and provides focus changes.\\n//\\n// Focus Policy\\n//   Window focusabilty - A window token can be focused if there is at least one window handle that\\n//   is visible with the same token and all window handles with the same token are focusable.\\n//   See FocusResolver::isTokenFocusable\\n//\\n//   Focus request - Request will be granted if the window is focusable. If it's not\\n//   focusable, then the request is persisted and granted when it becomes focusable. The currently\\n//   focused window will lose focus and any pending keys will be added to a queue so it can be sent\\n//   to the window when it gets focus.\\n//\\n//   Condition focus request - Request with a focus token specified. Request will be granted if the\\n//   window is focusable and the focus token is the currently focused. Otherwise, the request is\\n//   dropped. Conditional focus requests are not persisted. The window will lose focus and go back\\n//   to the focus token if it becomes not focusable.\\n//\\n//   Window handle updates - Focus is lost when the currently focused window becomes not focusable.\\n//   If the previous focus request is focusable, then we will try to grant that window focus.\\nclass FocusResolver {\\npublic:\\n    // Returns the focused window token on the specified display.\\n    sp<IBinder> getFocusedWindowToken(ui::LogicalDisplayId displayId) const;\\n\\n    struct FocusChanges {\\n        sp<IBinder> oldFocus;\\n        sp<IBinder> newFocus;\\n        ui::LogicalDisplayId displayId;\\n        std::string reason;\\n    };\\n    std::optional<FocusResolver::FocusChanges> setInputWindows(\\n            ui::LogicalDisplayId displayId,\\n            const std::vector<sp<android::gui::WindowInfoHandle>>& windows);\\n    std::optional<FocusResolver::FocusChanges> setFocusedWindow(\\n            const android::gui::FocusRequest& request,\\n            const std::vector<sp<android::gui::WindowInfoHandle>>& windows);\\n\\n    // Display has been removed from the system, clean up old references.\\n    void displayRemoved(ui::LogicalDisplayId displayId);\\n\\n    // exposed for debugging\\n    bool hasFocusedWindowTokens() const { return !mFocusedWindowTokenByDisplay.empty(); }\\n    std::string dumpFocusedWindows() const;\\n    std::string dump() const;\\n\\nprivate:\\n    enum class Focusability {\\n        OK,\\n        NO_WINDOW,\\n        NOT_FOCUSABLE,\\n        NOT_VISIBLE,\\n\\n        ftl_last = NOT_VISIBLE\\n    };\\n\\n    // Checks if the window token can be focused on a display. The token can be focused if there is\\n    // at least one window handle that is visible with the same token and all window handles with\\n    // the same token are focusable.\\n    //\\n    // In the case of mirroring, two windows may share the same window token and their visibility\\n    // might be different. Example, the mirrored window can cover the window its mirroring. However,\\n    // we expect the focusability of the windows to match since its hard to reason why one window\\n    // can receive focus events and the other cannot when both are backed by the same input channel.\\n    //\\n    static Focusability isTokenFocusable(\\n            const sp<IBinder>& token,\\n            const std::vector<sp<android::gui::WindowInfoHandle>>& windows,\\n            sp<android::gui::WindowInfoHandle>& outFocusableWindow);\\n\\n    static FocusResolver::Focusability getResolvedFocusWindow(\\n            const sp<IBinder>& token,\\n            const std::vector<sp<android::gui::WindowInfoHandle>>& windows,\\n            sp<android::gui::WindowInfoHandle>& outFocusableWindow);\\n\\n    // Focus tracking for keys, trackball, etc. A window token can be associated with one or\\n    // more InputWindowHandles. If a window is mirrored, the window and its mirror will share\\n    // the same token. Focus is tracked by the token per display and the events are dispatched\\n    // to the channel associated by this token.\\n    typedef std::pair<std::string /* name */, sp<IBinder>> NamedToken;\\n    std::unordered_map<ui::LogicalDisplayId /* displayId */, NamedToken>\\n            mFocusedWindowTokenByDisplay;\\n\\n    // This map will store the focus request per display. This is used to add more debug information\\n    // in the event logs.\\n    std::unordered_map<ui::LogicalDisplayId /* displayId */, Focusability>\\n            mLastFocusResultByDisplay;\\n\\n    std::optional<FocusResolver::FocusChanges> updateFocusedWindow(\\n            ui::LogicalDisplayId displayId, const std::string& reason, const sp<IBinder>& token,\\n            const std::string& tokenName = \\\"\\\");\\n    std::optional<android::gui::FocusRequest> getFocusRequest(ui::LogicalDisplayId displayId);\\n};\\n\\n} // namespace android::inputdispatcher\\n\",\"numLines\":129,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":129}}"</outcome>

# Android 焦点窗口体系：WMS ↔ InputDispatcher ↔ SurfaceFlinger 关系详解

## 一、核心结论

| 组件 | 职责 | 与 SurfaceFlinger 关系 |
|------|------|------------------------|
| **WMS** | 管理 `mCurrentFocus`、调用 `updateFocusedWindowLocked()` | 不直接涉及 |
| **InputDispatcher** | 维护焦点窗口状态、分发输入事件 | **间接涉及**（通过 Transaction） |
| **SurfaceFlinger** | 图层合成、显示 | **不参与焦点判断** |

---

## 二、WMS 焦点窗口设置流程

### 1. 核心代码路径

```
WMS.updateFocusedWindowLocked()  [WMS.java:6438]
    └── mRoot.updateFocusedWindowLocked()
            └── DisplayContent.updateFocusedWindowLocked()
                    └── InputMonitor.setInputFocusLw()  [InputMonitor.java:503]
                            └── mInputTransaction.setFocusedWindow()  [SurfaceControl.Transaction]
```

### 2. WMS 中的焦点变量

```java
// WindowManagerService.java
IBinder mCurrentFocus;  // 当前焦点窗口的 token

// DisplayContent.java  
IBinder mCurrentFocus;  // 每个 Display 的焦点窗口

// InputMonitor.java
IBinder mInputFocus;   // 输入系统关注的焦点
long mInputFocusRequestTimeMillis;
```

### 3. 关键代码

```java
// InputMonitor.java:506-516
private void requestFocus(IBinder focusToken, String windowName) {
    if (focusToken == mInputFocus) {
        return;
    }
    
    mInputFocus = focusToken;
    mInputFocusRequestTimeMillis = SystemClock.uptimeMillis();
    // 设置焦点窗口（通过 SurfaceControl Transaction）
    mInputTransaction.setFocusedWindow(mInputFocus, windowName, mDisplayId);
    EventLog.writeEvent(LOGTAG_INPUT_FOCUS, "Focus request " + windowName,
            "reason=UpdateInputWindows");
}
```

---

## 三、InputDispatcher 的焦点管理

### 1. FocusResolver 架构

```cpp
// FocusResolver.h
class FocusResolver {
    // 焦点窗口 token（按 Display 存储）
    std::unordered_map<ui::LogicalDisplayId, 
        std::pair<std::string, sp<IBinder>>> mFocusedWindowTokenByDisplay;
    
    // 焦点请求（按 Display 存储）
    std::unordered_map<ui::LogicalDisplayId, 
        gui::FocusRequest> mFocusRequestByDisplay;
};
```

### 2. InputDispatcher 焦点检测

```cpp
// InputDispatcher.cpp:2303
void InputDispatcher::findFocusedWindowTargetLocked(...) {
    sp<WindowInfoHandle> focusedWindowHandle = 
        getFocusedWindowHandleLocked(displayId);
    
    // 三种情况处理：
    // 1. 有焦点窗口 → 正常分发
    // 2. 无焦点窗口 但有焦点应用 → 启动 ANR 定时器
    // 3. 无焦点窗口 且无焦点应用 → 直接丢弃事件
    
    if (focusedWindowHandle == nullptr && 
        mAwaitedFocusedApplication != nullptr) {
        // 启动 5 秒超时
        if (!mNoFocusedWindowTimeoutTime.has_value()) {
            mNoFocusedWindowTimeoutTime = currentTime + timeout.count();
        }
    }
}
```

### 3. InputDispatcher 的关键方法

| 方法 | 位置 | 功能 |
|------|------|------|
| `setFocusedWindow()` | FocusResolver.cpp | 处理焦点请求 |
| `findFocusedWindowTargetLocked()` | InputDispatcher.cpp | 找到焦点窗口目标 |
| `getFocusedWindowHandleLocked()` | InputDispatcher.cpp | 获取焦点窗口句柄 |
| `processNoFocusedWindowAnrLocked()` | InputDispatcher.cpp | 处理 ANR |

---

## 四、与 SurfaceFlinger 的关系

### 1. **核心结论：SurfaceFlinger 不参与焦点判断**

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        InputDispatcher                          │
│  ┌──────────────┐    ┌─────────────────┐    ┌───────────────┐  │
│  │ FocusResolver │    │ WindowInfoHandle │    │ InputChannel │  │
│  │ (内存状态)    │    │ (窗口信息)        │    │ (事件通道)    │  │
│  └──────────────┘    └─────────────────┘    └───────────────┘  │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                              │
                              │ binder IPC
                              ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                       SurfaceFlinger                              │
│  ┌──────────────┐    ┌─────────────────┐    ┌───────────────┐  │
│  │ Layer (图层)  │    │ SurfaceControl  │    │ BufferQueue  │  │
│  │ (合成单位)    │    │ (控制信息)       │    │ (图形缓冲区)  │  │
│  └──────────────┘    └─────────────────┘    └───────────────┘  │
│                                                                  │
│  职责：图层合成、帧率控制、显示输出                                │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 2. `setFocusedWindow()` 在 SurfaceFlinger 侧的处理

```cpp
// SurfaceFlinger.cpp (推测)
void SurfaceFlinger::setFocusedWindow(...) {
    // SurfaceFlinger 记录焦点窗口信息，用于：
    // 1. IME 窗口位置调整
    // 2. 焦点高亮效果（如有）
    // 
    // 但 SurfaceFlinger 不会主动告知 InputDispatcher 焦点状态
}
```

### 3. InputWindowHandle 与 SurfaceControl 的关联

```java
// WindowState.java 中的关联
final InputWindowHandleWrapper mInputWindowHandle;

// InputWindowHandleWrapper 持有 WindowInfo
// WindowInfo 包含 SurfaceControl 信息
```

---

## 五、完整焦点流程图

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        应用进程 (Client)                                 │
│                                                                          │
│  Activity.handleResumeActivity()                                         │
│      └── ViewRootImpl.setView()                                         │
│              └── mWindowSession.addToDisplay()                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                    │ Binder IPC
                                    ▼
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    系统进程 - WMS (WindowManagerService)                 │
│                                                                          │
│  addWindow()                                                            │
│      ├── 创建 WindowState                                               │
│      ├── 创建 WindowToken                                               │
│      └── addWindowToken()                                               │
│                                                                          │
│  relayoutWindow()                                                       │
│      └── 分配 Surface、设置窗口尺寸                                      │
│                                                                          │
│  updateFocusedWindowLocked()                                            │
│      └── InputMonitor.setInputFocusLw()                                │
│              └── mInputTransaction.setFocusedWindow(token, name, displayId)│
│                      │                                                    │
│                      │ SurfaceControl.Transaction (Binder)                │
└──────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                       │
                       ▼
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    系统进程 - InputDispatcher (Native)                     │
│                                                                          │
│  setFocusedWindow() [FocusResolver]                                    │
│      └── 更新 mFocusedWindowTokenByDisplay                               │
│                                                                          │
│  dispatchEvent()                                                        │
│      └── findFocusedWindowTargetLocked()                                 │
│              └── 获取焦点窗口 token                                       │
│              └── 通过 InputChannel 发送事件                                │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                       ▲
                       │ (SurfaceFlinger 不直接涉及焦点)
                       │
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    系统进程 - SurfaceFlinger                             │
│                                                                          │
│  handleMessageInvalidate()                                              │
│      └── compose() // 图层合成                                           │
│      └── postFrame() // 输出到显示                                       │
│                                                                          │
│  注：SurfaceFlinger 只负责显示，不判断焦点                               │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 六、关键区别

| 问题 | 答案 |
|------|------|
| **WMS 的 `updateFocusedWindow` 是否涉及 SurfaceFlinger?** | 否，`setFocusedWindow()` 通过 SurfaceControl.Transaction 设置，但 SurfaceFlinger 只记录状态 |
| **InputDispatcher 如何知道焦点窗口?** | 通过 `FocusResolver` 维护的 `mFocusedWindowTokenByDisplay` |
| **SurfaceFlinger 参与焦点判断吗?** | 不参与，它只负责合成和显示 |
| **为什么触摸事件能找到正确的窗口?** | 触摸分发走 `TouchState`，不使用焦点机制 |

```java
    mInputFocusRequestTimeMillis = SystemClock.uptimeMillis();
    // 设置焦点窗口（通过 SurfaceControl Transaction）
    mInputTransaction.setFocusedWindow(mInputFocus, windowName, mDisplayId);
    EventLog.writeEvent(LOGTAG_INPUT_FOCUS, "Focus request " + windowName,
            "reason=UpdateInputWindows");
}
```

## 三、InputDispatcher 的焦点管理

### 1. FocusResolver 架构

```cpp
// FocusResolver.h
class FocusResolver {
    // 焦点窗口 token（按 Display 存储）
    std::unordered_map<ui::LogicalDisplayId, 
        std::pair<std::string, sp<IBinder>>> mFocusedWindowTokenByDisplay;
    
    // 焦点请求（按 Display 存储）
    std::unordered_map<ui::LogicalDisplayId, 
        gui::FocusRequest> mFocusRequestByDisplay;
};
```

### 2. InputDispatcher 焦点检测

```cpp
// InputDispatcher.cpp:2303
void InputDispatcher::findFocusedWindowTargetLocked(...) {
    sp<WindowInfoHandle> focusedWindowHandle = 
        getFocusedWindowHandleLocked(displayId);
    
    // 三种情况处理：
    // 1. 有焦点窗口 → 正常分发
    // 2. 无焦点窗口 但有焦点应用 → 启动 ANR 定时器
    // 3. 无焦点窗口 且无焦点应用 → 直接丢弃事件
    
    if (focusedWindowHandle == nullptr && 
        mAwaitedFocusedApplication != nullptr) {
        // 启动 5 秒超时
        if (!mNoFocusedWindowTimeoutTime.has_value()) {
            mNoFocusedWindowTimeoutTime = currentTime + timeout.count();
        }
    }
}
```

### 3. InputDispatcher 的关键方法

| 方法 | 位置 | 功能 |
|------|------|------|
| `setFocusedWindow()` | FocusResolver.cpp | 处理焦点请求 |
| `findFocusedWindowTargetLocked()` | InputDispatcher.cpp | 找到焦点窗口目标 |
| `getFocusedWindowHandleLocked()` | InputDispatcher.cpp | 获取焦点窗口句柄 |
| `processNoFocusedWindowAnrLocked()` | InputDispatcher.cpp | 处理 ANR |

## 六、关键区别

| 问题 | 答案 |
|------|------|
| **WMS 的 `updateFocusedWindow` 是否涉及 SurfaceFlinger?** | 否，`setFocusedWindow()` 通过 SurfaceControl.Transaction 设置，但 SurfaceFlinger 只记录状态 |
| **InputDispatcher 如何知道焦点窗口?** | 通过 `FocusResolver` 维护的 `mFocusedWindowTokenByDisplay` |
| **SurfaceFlinger 参与焦点判断吗?** | 不参与，它只负责合成和显示 |
| **为什么触摸事件能找到正确的窗口?** | 触摸分发走 `TouchState`，不使用焦点机制 |
